title: It Happened Tomorrow
writer: Dudley Nichols, René Clair, Lord Dunsany
actors: Dick Powell, Linda Darnell, Jack Oakie
plot: A young turn-of-the-century newspaper man finds he can get hold of the next day's paper. This brings more problems than fortune, especially as his new girlfriend is part of a phony clairvoyant act.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 2 wins & 3 nominations total
